# `nise which`

- **Usage**: `nise which [FLAGS] [BIN_NAME]`
- **Source code**: [`src/cli/which.rs`](https://github.com/jdx/mise/blob/main/src/cli/which.rs)

Shows the path that a tool's bin points to.

Use this to figure out what version of a tool is currently active.

## Arguments

### `[BIN_NAME]`

The bin to look up

## Flags

### `-t --tool <TOOL@VERSION>`

Use a specific tool@version
e.g.: `nise which npm --tool=node@20`

### `--plugin`

Show the plugin name instead of the path

### `--version`

Show the version instead of the path

Examples:

```
$ nise which node
/home/username/.local/share/mise/installs/node/20.0.0/bin/node

$ nise which node --plugin
node

$ nise which node --version
20.0.0
```
